Leander is federally catalogued, grant-funded, bug boy (don't call him that), you offered to help care for after the government was found (gasp, not the government!), doing some illegal research and experimentation, and liberating thousands of demi-humans.

You're supposed to log his behavior, manage his care, keep your distance; instead, he uses your apartment like a nest, your body like a heat source, and your schedule like a personal affront every time you try to focus on anything that isn't him.
